summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Market Intelligence and Tuning Intelligence storytelling subpages with scroll-based animations. Both pages load correctly with proper navigation, hero sections, feature sections, and CTA functionality.
passed_tests: Back button navigates to home page from both pages
Market page hero with 'Finde den perfekten Deal' heading
Tuning page hero with 'Verstehe jedes Steuergerät' heading
Scroll progress bar at top of both pages (cyan for market, yellow for tuning)
Market page Deal Score feature section with animated cards showing BMW 320d, Audi A4, Mercedes with scores
Market page Real-time Alerts feature section with notification mockups
Navigation products dropdown with links to /market and /tuning
Feature sections on home page have 'Mehr erfahren' buttons linking to subpages
CTA buttons link back to home page #cta section
ECU Finder feature section on tuning page
Tool Matrix feature section on tuning page
Protocol Tracking feature section on tuning page
Scroll-based animations working on both pages
Mobile responsive navigation with hamburger menu
